column2: Verify System Prevents Deletion of Active Phased Trial Build-Up
column3: ['Log in as a CAA program manager to the system. ', 'Navigate to the active phased trial build-up and attempt to delete it. ', "Verify that an error message is displayed indicating that the phased trial build-up cannot be deleted while it's still active. "]
column4: ['Successfully log in with valid credentials. ', 'The system does not allow deletion of an active phased trial build-up. ', 'An appropriate error message is shown on the screen. ']
